use_cases: Form input for scheduling appointments or meetings with time selection
Booking systems requiring start or end time selection
Event duration or time-based filtering in dashboards
Time tracking or timesheet entry in productivity apps
ai_summary: A dual-dropdown time picker component that allows users to select hours (0-23) and minutes (0-55 in 5-minute increments) with a clean, bordered interface. Features dark/light mode support, click-to-reveal dropdowns with hover states, and Lucide icons for visual context. Built with Tailwind CSS for styling and React state hooks for interaction management.
